title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails for triggers that use the table name with a different case
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION TestTriggerFunction() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN UPDATE TestTable SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = NEW.id;
CREATE TRIGGER TestTrigger AFTER INSERT ON TestTable FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION TestTriggerFunction();
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME with case-sensitive trigger names
